name: Youssef Hamed
notes:
Youssef Hamed Network (AS207740) is the first autonomous system operated by an Egyptian student. This network is IPv6-focused and exists primarily for learning and research purposes. It is a non-profit project operated by an individual student.

I’m happy to peer with everyone; however, you must maintain complete and up-to-date PeeringDB records, including your AS-SET and contact information.

We can peer together through any (physical or virtual) Internet Exchanges we have in common (preferred) or via tunnel.

Feel free to reach out to me on Telegram @AmirOVH or by email.
